<!-- PART 1: PROJECT — generated by Strategist, edit freely -->
## Project Overview
Camera Dashboard is a self-hosted home security camera monitor running on the local network. It aggregates multiple Imou/Yosee RTSP cameras into a single web dashboard so the owner can quickly check live feeds from any device in the house without opening vendor apps. The goal is fast, always-on visibility with a professional control-room feel.

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Python 3 + Flask
- Storage: SQLite (camera config + admin metadata)
- Video: OpenCV for RTSP capture, MJPEG stream proxy to the browser
- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript + HTML + CSS (no framework)
- Deployment: Local network (LAN), single host

## Specific Requirements
- Grid view showing all configured cameras simultaneously
- Single camera detail view with larger stream
- Admin panel to add/edit/remove cameras and credentials
- MJPEG stream proxy with automatic reconnect/retry on stream drop
- Bottom navigation bar for switching between views
- Support for Imou and Yosee RTSP camera models
- Professional dark-theme UI (industrial / control-room aesthetic)

## Constraints
- Runs on local network only — no cloud, no external exposure
- Must work in modern desktop and mobile browsers
- Vanilla JS only on the frontend (no React/Vue build pipeline)
- Low-latency MJPEG playback over LAN must remain smooth after redesign
<!-- END PART 1 -->

## Workflow Reference

All agent definitions, skills, and rules live in `.ai/` — the single source of truth.
For complete workflow documentation: @.claude/full_workflow.md

### Agents
| Agent | File | Model |
|-------|------|-------|
| Strategist | `.ai/agents/strategist.md` | opus |
| Architect | `.ai/agents/architect.md` | opus |
| Tester | `.ai/agents/tester.md` | sonnet |
| Implementor | `.ai/agents/implementor.md` | haiku |
| Verifier | `.ai/agents/verifier.md` | sonnet |
| Debugger | `.ai/agents/debugger.md` | opus |

### Skills
| Skill | File |
|-------|------|
| Workflow | `.ai/skills/workflow/SKILL.md` |
| Discuss | `.ai/skills/discuss/SKILL.md` |
| Investigate | `.ai/skills/investigate/SKILL.md` |
| Wiki | `.ai/skills/wiki/SKILL.md` |
| UI Spec | `.ai/skills/ui-spec/SKILL.md` |
| GitNexus (auto-installed) | `.claude/skills/gitnexus/` |
| Playwright (auto-installed) | `.claude/skills/dev/` |

### Active Task State
```
.ai/active/current/   ← currently running task
.ai/active/paused/    ← interrupted by bug fix, waiting to resume
```

### Key Files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------| 
| `ROADMAP.md` | Milestones & macro status |
| `REQUIREMENTS.md` | Feature backlog |
| `.ai/active/current/SPEC.md` | Feature contract (current task) |
| `.ai/active/current/DESIGN.md` | UI design system (current task, if UI in scope) |
| `.ai/active/current/PLAN.md` | Execution waves (current task) |
| `.ai/active/current/STATE.md` | Live progress (current task) |
